pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Leadership & Strategy is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI.

decision_rationale: Leadership & Strategy skill KSA is within scope for the Director of AI Ethics/Responsible AI at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
